infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GPS Attendance needs your location to verify your attendance at sessions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GPS Attendance needs your location to track attendance automatically.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GPS Attendance needs continuous location access for automatic attendance tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GPS Attendance needs camera access to take attendance selfies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GPS Attendance needs photo library access to select profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GPS Attendance needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GPS Attendance needs microphone access for video recordings.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: GPS Attendance uses Face ID for secure authentication.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This app uses tracking to improve your experience.
